productDisplayName: Arrow Sport Men Stripes Blue Shirts
description: Composition Red shirt with blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest with a brand tag, curved hem, and embroidered brand name on the right sleeve FittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsStylish and subtle, this shirt from the arrow sport collection is made with fine attention to detail that will quickly elevate it to a wardrobe favourite. The full sleeves add a regal touch to your formal look and also keep the winter chill at bay, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with simple chinos for a knockout weekend style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'3&rdquo , Shoulders: 19"
